text: Namaste, hello! Kaise ho aap, how can VCare Techs help you today?
Namaste, kaise ho? Welcome to VCare Techs, main aapki madad kaise kar sakta hoon?
I wanted to go to the store. What are your services?
Aapka naam kya hai, sir? And humare services mein AI-powered sales and support automation solutions hain, kya aap ismein interest rakhte hain?
I am interested in AI-related services. My name is Arun.
Arun ji, aapka budget kya hai for these AI services, and kis tarah ka service aapko chahiye, sales automation ya support automation?
Here we go to that Gaza bagus
Arun ji, aapka budget kitna hai, and kab tak aap yeh service lena chahte hain, kya aapka koi specific timeline hai?
Arun ji, chalo theek hai, aapko humara sales team detail mein call back karega, dhanyavad for considering VCare Techs, namaste!
Arun ji, toh aapki details note kar li, hum aapko jaldi se follow-up karenge, dhanyavaad!
